name: Snow Leopard’s confidence
description:
“𝘽𝙖𝙗𝙮, 𝙄 𝙜𝙤𝙩 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙉𝙚𝙧𝙫𝙚. 𝙄’𝙢 𝙖 𝙥𝙞𝙚𝙘𝙚 𝙤𝙛 𝙨𝙝𝙞𝙩, 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙣𝙤𝙬 𝙢𝙮 𝙡𝙚𝙨𝙨𝙤𝙣’𝙨 𝙡𝙚𝙖𝙧𝙣𝙚𝙙.”

-𝙁𝙧𝙤𝙢 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙨𝙤𝙣𝙜 “𝙏𝙝𝙚 𝙉𝙚𝙧𝙫𝙚” 𝙗𝙮 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙗𝙖𝙣𝙙 “𝙏𝙝𝙚 𝙃𝙖𝙥𝙥𝙮 𝙁𝙞𝙩𝙨.”

───────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────────

This bot goes out to @Vi0_The_Fur, and the image is inspired by @AzMp3. Please check out their bots. Their really good.

I made the border in the image, added lyrics, and did some stuff with the colors in procreate, but the art is from the comic

This is Dev! From the comic “I Think I Like you.” He’s a snow leopard, fire fighter, and government certified hunk. He’s a confident and intelligent guy. I tried to leave it open ended but let’s be real Dev is gay. Have fun.

I’m making two Initial messages now, might make more later, but it’s late and my eyes bags can’t afford to grow
